memoryArtifacts.headline: Page 627. Bulkeley of Cheadle-Bulkeley and Beaumaris. Vol III, 1882. George Omerod
memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 627. Vol III. 1882
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.  
In 3 Volumes, Volume III,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages
Second Edition, 1882 
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Bostock於1350年出生在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，她的父親Sir Adam De Bostock25歲，母親Margaret Whetenhall25歲。她和William Bulkeley至少有2個兒子。她去世於1385年在英國史洛普爾享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Bostock于1350年出生在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德时，她的父亲Sir Adam De Bostock25岁，母亲Margaret Whetenhall25岁。她和William Bulkeley至少有2个儿子。她去世于1385年在英国史洛普爾享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Bostock was born in 1350, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Adam De Bostock, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Whetenhall, was 25. She had at least 2 sons with William Bulkeley. She died in 1385, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Bostock est née en 1350, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Adam De Bostock, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whetenhall, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec William Bulkeley. Elle est décédée en 1385, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Bostock 1350 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Adam De Bostock 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Whetenhall 25. Sie hatte mit William Bulkeley mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1385 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Bostock è nata il nel 1350 nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Adam De Bostock, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Whetenhall, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con William Bulkeley. Morì nel 1385, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Bostockが1350年にイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Adam De Bostockは25歳，母Margaret Whetenhallは25歳であった。彼女はWilliam Bulkeleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1385年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Bostock(이)가 1350년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Adam De Bostock(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Whetenhall(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 William Bulkeley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 슈럽실르에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Bostock nasceu em 1350, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Adam De Bostock, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whetenhall, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com William Bulkeley. Ela faleceu em 1385, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Bostock родилась в 1350 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Adam De Bostock было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whetenhall, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от William Bulkeley. Она умерла в 1385 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Bostock nació en 1350, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Adam De Bostock, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Whetenhall, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con William Bulkeley. Murió en 1385, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
